name: Transit (ATM)
content: Milan has a very usable transit system of buses, subways, streetcars, and trains. I enjoyed using it. My American colleagues insisted on getting taxis everywhere. The only thing I enjoyed more than using the Milan public transit system was the time I forced my colleagues to take the subway to a restaurant, and I watched the looks on their faces as they realized the subway was faster, cheaper, and simpler than taking a taxi.
